summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary

TYME Technologies is a professional services company that helps enterprises accelerate their data, AI, and digital initiatives through a unique three-phase approach: **Design, Build, and Operate**. They offer two flexible engagement models: **Outcome-Based Consulting Projects** (dedicated cross-functional teams delivering against defined outcomes) and **Technical Augmentation** (embedding vetted technical talent into existing teams within two weeks). Founded in 2025 in London by Jack Moore, Chris Monticolombi, Luke Ashe-Browne, and Matt Smith, TYME positions itself as a partner that closes the execution gap between ambition and technical reality, providing strategic advisory, technical squads, on-demand delivery, and nearshore delivery services.
